auth.title: What's your name?
auth.subtitle: Enter your name to start your fitness journey

ppl.name: PPL
ppl.description: Push - Pull - Legs: Classic three-day split

upperLower.name: Upper / Lower
upperLower.description: Upper body and lower body split

broSplit.name: Bro Split
broSplit.description: Each muscle group on its own day

setup: Lie on the bench with feet flat on the floor
Grip the bar at shoulder width
Fully extend your arms locking the bar
Squeeze your shoulder blades together
execution: Lower the bar slowly toward mid-chest
Keep elbows at a 45-degree angle to your body
Drive the bar up powerfully until arms are extended
Keep your glutes on the bench throughout
breathing: Take a deep breath as you lower the bar
Exhale forcefully as you push the bar up
rom: Lower the bar until it touches your chest
Fully extend arms at the top without locking elbows
mistakes: Raising your glutes off the bench
Not touching the bar to your chest
Locking your elbows completely at the top
tips: Focus on squeezing your chest as you push
Use a spotter for heavy weights

setup: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Raise the bar to shoulder level
Grip the bar at shoulder width with an overhand grip
execution: Press the bar overhead until arms are extended
Keep your body upright
Lower the bar slowly back to shoulder level
breathing: Breathe in as you lower the bar
Exhale as you press the bar overhead
rom: Lower the bar to chin level
Fully extend arms overhead
mistakes: Arching your back excessively
Using leg drive to push the bar
tips: Engage your core throughout the movement
Keep your elbows slightly in front of the bar

setup: Set the bench to a 30-45 degree angle
Hold a dumbbell in each hand at chest level
execution: Press the dumbbells up until arms are extended
Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest
Pause briefly at the bottom for a deeper stretch
rom: Lower dumbbells to chest level
Fully extend arms at the top
mistakes: Setting the bench at too steep an angle
Lowering dumbbells too far from your chest
tips: Focus on squeezing your upper chest as you press

setup: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides
execution: Raise the dumbbells out to the sides to shoulder height
Keep a slight bend in your elbows
Lower the dumbbells slowly back down
breathing: Exhale as you raise the dumbbells
rom: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height
Don't exceed shoulder height
mistakes: Using body momentum to lift
Raising dumbbells above shoulder height
tips: Use light weights and focus on the squeeze
Imagine pouring a pitcher as you raise

setup: Set the cable to the highest position
Grip the V-bar with an overhand grip
execution: Push the handle down until arms are fully extended
Keep your elbows pinned to your sides
Slowly return the handle to the starting position
rom: Fully extend your arms at the bottom
Return to a 90-degree angle
mistakes: Letting your elbows flare away from your body
Using too much weight
tips: Lock your elbows in place throughout the movement

setup: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over midfoot
Hinge at hips and knees to grip the bar
Grip the bar at shoulder width
Keep your back straight
execution: Drive through your heels to lift the bar
Keep the bar close to your body throughout
Extend your hips and knees fully at the top
Lower the bar slowly with a straight back
breathing: Take a deep breath before each rep
Hold your breath during the lift and exhale at the top
rom: Lower the bar to touch the floor between reps
Don't bounce the bar off the floor
mistakes: Rounding your back during the lift
Letting the bar drift away from your body
Not fully extending at the top
tips: Imagine pushing the floor away with your feet
Start each rep from a dead stop
Use a belt for heavy sets

setup: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Hinge forward at the hips with a straight back
Grip the bar with an overhand grip at shoulder width
execution: Pull the bar toward your lower chest
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top
Lower the bar slowly with arms extended
breathing: Exhale as you pull the bar
rom: Pull the bar until it touches your lower chest
Fully extend your arms at the bottom
mistakes: Using body momentum to pull the bar
Rounding your back
tips: Maintain a constant body angle
Focus on pulling with your back muscles

setup: Grip the bar with a wide overhand grip
Hang with arms fully extended
execution: Pull your body up until your chin clears the bar
Lower yourself slowly until arms are fully extended
Pause briefly at the bottom
rom: Lower until arms are fully extended
Pull up until your chin clears the bar
mistakes: Swinging your body during the movement
Not achieving full arm extension
tips: Think about pulling the bar down rather than lifting yourself
Keep your core engaged throughout

setup: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with arms extended
execution: Curl the dumbbells toward your shoulders
Pause briefly at the top and squeeze
Lower the dumbbells slowly back down
rom: Fully extend arms at the bottom
Curl until dumbbells reach shoulder level
mistakes: Using body momentum to lift
Not fully extending arms at the bottom
tips: Keep your elbows pinned to your sides throughout

setup: Position the bar on your traps behind your neck
Grip the bar at a comfortable width
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly out
Engage your core and keep your back tight
execution: Bend your knees and hips to lower down
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the ground
Drive through your heels to stand back up
Keep your back straight throughout
breathing: Take a deep breath before descending
Hold your breath during descent, exhale on the way up
rom: Descend until thighs are at least parallel to ground
Fully extend your knees at the top
mistakes: Leaning your torso too far forward
Not going deep enough
Lifting your heels off the ground
tips: Imagine sitting back into a chair behind you
Keep your eyes looking forward and slightly up

setup: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Grip the bar at shoulder width
execution: Push your hips back keeping legs slightly bent
Lower the bar along your legs
Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings
Return by driving your hips forward
breathing: Exhale as you return to standing
rom: Lower the bar to mid-shin level
Return to a fully upright position
mistakes: Rounding your back
Bending your knees too much
tips: Keep the bar in contact with your legs
Push your hips back, not down

setup: Sit in the leg press machine
Place feet shoulder-width apart on the platform
execution: Lower the platform to a 90-degree knee angle
Press the platform up without locking your knees
Pause briefly at the top
rom: Lower to a 90-degree knee angle
Don't lock your knees at the top
mistakes: Placing feet too low on the platform
Locking your knees completely
tips: Keep your lower back pressed against the seat

setup: Stand with feet together holding a dumbbell in each hand
Keep your torso upright
execution: Step forward with your right leg
Bend both knees to a 90-degree angle
Push through the heel to return to the starting position
breathing: Exhale as you push back up
rom: Lower until your back knee is close to the ground
Keep your front knee behind your toes
mistakes: Front knee extending past your toes
Leaning your torso forward
tips: Take a shorter step for better control

setup: Stand on a calf raise machine or step edge
Place the balls of your feet on the edge
execution: Raise your heels as high as possible
Pause briefly at the top
Lower your heels slowly back down
rom: Raise your heels to maximum height
Lower your heels down for a full stretch
mistakes: Moving too quickly
Not using the full range of motion
tips: Pause for a second at the top for maximum contraction
